description_long: This house features a simple, rectangular layout with a flat roof and a single main structure set on a large, flat base. The facade includes a series of evenly spaced rectangular windows and a prominent central entryway, suggesting a functional and modern design. The windows are arranged in a symmetrical pattern, providing balanced natural light to the interior. The roofline is flat, with a small raised section at the rear, possibly indicating a utility or mechanical area. The exterior walls are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist architectural style. The house sits on a broad platform, which could serve as a driveway, patio, or yard space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with symmetrical windows and a central entryway, set on a large rectangular base. The design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and a smooth exterior.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway and a symmetrical arrangement of windows, highlighting the house's minimalist facade.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the house and the flat roof, with fewer visible windows and a clear view of the extended base.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back wall with additional windows and a small raised section on the roof, possibly for utilities.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the side elevation, with a few windows and the extended platform base, emphasizing the house's rectangular footprint.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a flat overhang, no porch or decorative columns, and a simple, modern door.
